goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the attraction' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'food type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum and should be in the centre
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the same area as the attraction and should be in the moderate price range
Make sure you get phone number and food type
